title: DayClient
description: client - side mod made for pvp 1.20.1
body:
![WELCOME](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/263d30140d67eb9fa9c41399c80b67b0e25df295.png)

DayClient is a PvP mod designed to improve your Minecraft experience with various utility modules and customization options. ## REQUIREMENTS

## Custom Music Player Do you have little RAM so you can't listen to music and play at the same time? If so, we come up with a solution because we have a built-in installer for music from YouTube or Spotify, all you need is a link to the Internet and that's it, listen to your favorite music as much as you want! ![MODULES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e54eda1abd1d14c5f3a005e5922bf2908d99b0c6.png) ## PvP Modules Get 30+ essential tools for competitive play, including HUD improvements and gameplay utilities. ![MODULES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92e9287f84700e4a2cb30b2286b5bd24e3e7ba8b.png) ## Beta Access Join the development process! Keep in mind that the mod is currently in Beta, and we are continually working on bug fixes and new features. ## Configuration DayClient provides an easy-to-use settings menu where you can adjust every module to match your playstyle. ## Disclaimer ⚠️ This project is in its Beta stage. You might come across bugs. If you notice any, please report them to help us improve the client. + you must instal fabric api! DayClient© 2026 made by lander_on
